name: Find the Lost Patrol
description: Third Squad hasn't reported in. The Iron-Beak Vultures circling the eastern ruins appeared the same time the patrol went silent. Investigate — and clear the birds.
accept_text: 'Third Squad. Six soldiers. I sent them to investigate strange lights near the eastern ruins two days ago.' He pauses. 'The Iron-Beaks started circling that area at the same time. Draw your own conclusions.' He meets your eyes. 'I need to know what's out there — whatever that means.'
complete_text: 'So the birds got them.' A long silence. 'I half-expected something worse.' He doesn't explain what 'worse' means. He just files the report and pays you your scraps.
